Title: Authorizes the trustees of the state university of New York to lease and contract to make available certain land on the SUNY Stony Brook campus
Summary: Authorizes the trustees of the state university of New York to lease and contract to make available certain land on the SUNY Stony Brook campus.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the trustees of the state university of New York to lease and contract to make available certain land on the state university of New York at Stony Brook's campus
